title: candollea longituba
intro: Candollea longituba is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Madagascar and other parts of the world. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Candollea longituba include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating infections, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Candollea longituba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
